chatParticipants.name: resources
chatParticipants.description: Search, install and manage agent resources

languageModelTools.name: resourceNinja_search
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search for agent resources such as skills, agents, prompts, instructions, hooks, MCP configs, plugin manifests, and Cursor rules / エージェントリソースを検索 / NINJA. For GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, or other AI coding assistants. Find resources by name, description, kind, or category.

query.description: Search query (resource name, description, kind, or category like 'github', 'python', 'mcp')

kind.description: Optional resource kind filter. Use 'all' or omit to search all resource kinds.

languageModelTools.name: resourceNinja_install
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Install an agent resource / エージェントリソースをインストール / NINJA. Supports skills, agents, prompts, instructions, hooks, MCP config resources, plugin manifests, and Cursor rules with explicit target selection.

resourceName.description: Exact name of the resource to install. Search first when unsure.

kind.description: Optional resource kind filter used to disambiguate resources with similar names.

languageModelTools.name: resourceNinja_list
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List workspace agent resources / ワークスペース内エージェントリソース一覧 / NINJA. Shows skills, agents, prompts, instructions, hooks, and MCP config resources available in the current workspace.

languageModelTools.name: resourceNinja_recommend
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Recommend agent resources for your project / プロジェクトに合ったエージェントリソースを推奨 / NINJA. Analyzes languages, frameworks, and file patterns.

languageModelTools.name: resourceNinja_uninstall
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Uninstall an agent resource / エージェントリソースをアンインストール / 削除 / NINJA. Removes a workspace resource; skill uninstall also updates the instruction sync target when enabled.

resourceName.description: Exact name of the installed workspace resource to uninstall. List resources first when unsure.

kind.description: Optional installed resource kind filter used to disambiguate resources with similar names.

languageModelTools.name: resourceNinja_updateIndex
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Update the resource index from all sources / リソースインデックスを更新 / 同期 / NINJA. Fetches latest resources from GitHub repositories.

languageModelTools.name: resourceNinja_webSearch
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search for agent resources on GitHub / GitHubでエージェントリソースを検索 / Web検索 / NINJA. Finds SKILL.md, .agent.md, .prompt.md, .instructions.md, and hook README files across GitHub repositories.

languageModelTools.name: resourceNinja_addSource
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Add a new GitHub repository as a resource source / 新しいリポジトリをリソースソースとして追加 / NINJA. Repository may contain SKILL.md, .agent.md, .prompt.md, .instructions.md, or hook README files.

languageModelTools.name: resourceNinja_localize
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Translate/localize resource descriptions in the index. Provide resourceName and description_en (English) and/or description_ja (Japanese) to update.

resourceName.description: Name of the resource to localize

description_ja.description: Japanese description for the resource (日本語の説明)

scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
